allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { \\$_.Path -like '*whamail*' -or \\$_.Path -like '*win-unpacked*' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { \\$_.Modules.FileName -like '*app.asar*' } | Select Id, ProcessName" 2>&1; handle="E:/whamail/desktop/release/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar"; powershell -Command "[System.IO.File]::Open\('E:\\\\whamail\\\\desktop\\\\release\\\\win-unpacked\\\\resources\\\\app.asar', 'Open', 'Read', 'Delete'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Select-Object Id, ProcessName | Format-Table" 2>&1 | grep -i "electron\\|whamail\\|node\\|7z\\|mail")

Bash(powershell -Command "& { \\$handle = \(Get-Process | ForEach-Object { \\$p = \\$_; \\$p.HandleCount } | Measure-Object -Sum\).Sum; Write-Host \\"Total handles: \\$handle\\" }; Get-Process | Sort-Object HandleCount -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 Id, ProcessName, HandleCount" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList '-Command Add-MpExclusion -Path E:\\\\whamail\\\\desktop\\\\release'" 2>&1; sleep 5; rm -rf "E:/whamail/desktop/release/win-unpacked" "E:/whamail/desktop/release/build" 2>&1)
